title: How Skilleareum Works
subtitle: Step-by-Step Product Tour
intro: This short guide explains how SkillEareum assesses your learning style and creates a personalized learning plan tailored just for you.

1.title: Login
1.description: Access your account securely to begin the onboarding process. Your journey to personalized AI learning starts here.

2.title: VARK Learning Assessment
2.description: Identify your preferred learning style (Visual, Auditory, Read/Write, or Kinesthetic) to tailor content delivery to your unique way of absorbing information

3.title: Cognitive Style Profiling (CSP)
3.description: Analyze how you process information, follow structure, and apply reasoning during learning to create an optimal experience.

4.title: AI Knowledge Assessment
4.description: Evaluate your current understanding of AI concepts to place you at the appropriate starting level and ensure content is neither too basic nor too advanced.

5.title: 37-Day Learning Roadmap
5.description: A personalized curriculum roadmap is generated based on your assessment results, designed to take you from your current level to AI proficiency.

6.title: Interactive Learning Activities
6.description: Reinforce learning using short, interactive formats designed for engagement and retention. Make learning fun and effective.

footer.title: Start Your Journey
footer.description: Begin your personalized learning experience today and unlock your full potential in artificial intelligence.
